MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alice Y. Ahn, Esq., of K&L GATES LLP (415-882-8200), appearing for defendant / moving party Schneider Electric USA, Inc. F/K/A Square D Company
Jennifer Alesio, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Arturo Cruz

RULING:
DEFENDANT SCHNEIDER ELECTRIC USA, INC. F/K/A SQUARE D COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Schneider Electric USA, Inc. F/K/A Square D Company's motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its burden of production and plaintiff failed to present evidence creating a triable issue whether any Square D products plaintiff worked with contained asbestos and whether any exposure to such products was a substantial factor in causing plaintiff's asbestos-related injury. Order and Judgment were signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
